name: No-Fat Italian Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the lemon juice, cider vinegar, unsweetened apple juice, oregano, dry mustard, onion powder, basil, thyme, rosemary, and garlic.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a jar or container and refrigerate for at least an hour or two to allow the flavors to meld together.
4. Before serving, remove the garlic pieces from the dressing.
5. This recipe makes approximately 12 tablespoons of dressing. Each tablespoon contains 9 calories and 0 grams of fat (0% fat).
